Serving the Bulkley Valley, BC

Growing Beautiful Spaces In the Bulkley Valley

From garden bed installation and patio hardscaping to custom plant starts and lawn care — Metta Growing brings thoughtful, hands-on landscaping to Smithers and the surrounding area.

Why Smithers Chooses Metta Growing

We combine deep local knowledge with genuine care for every plant, stone, and project we touch.

Locally Owned & Operated

Based in Smithers, BC, Metta Growing is a one-person business that knows this landscape intimately — the climate, the soil, and what grows well here.

Full-Service Growing

From seedling to finished garden — plant starts, landscape installation, hardscaping, and maintenance all under one roof. No project too small or too creative.

Honest Pricing

Clear, upfront quotes with no surprises. You'll know exactly what to expect before any work begins — because trust matters more than any single job.

About Summit Pro Builders

Built on Trust, Delivered With Pride

Since 2009, we've been transforming homes across the Denver metro area. What started as a two-person crew has grown into a full-service general contracting firm with a dedicated team of craftsmen, project managers, and designers.

Every project begins with listening. We take time to understand your vision, your budget, and your timeline, then build a plan that brings it all together.

Learn more about our story

What Our Clients Say

Real stories from Denver homeowners we've worked with.

"Summit Pro completely transformed our 1970s kitchen. They managed everything from permits to the final walkthrough. Came in on budget and two days early. Couldn't be happier."

JM

Jennifer Martinez

Kitchen Remodel, Highlands Ranch

"We added a 400 sq ft family room and it blends perfectly with the existing house. The team was professional, clean, and communicated every step of the way."

DT

David Thompson

Home Addition, Lakewood

"Our master bathroom went from dated to spa-quality. The tile work is stunning and the heated floors were worth every penny. Summit Pro is our go-to contractor now."

SR

Sarah Richardson

Bathroom Renovation, Boulder

Our Promise to You

On-Time Guarantee

We set a completion date and stick to it. If we miss our deadline, you get a discount. Period.

No Hidden Fees

Every cost is in writing before work begins. If the scope changes, you approve the cost first.

2-Year Warranty

Full workmanship warranty on all labor and installation. We stand behind every project we complete.
